text: ‘The hearth’; the word used here in the Hebrew is of quite uncertain significance.
The word given in the Latin as ‘engraving’, in the Hebrew text appears to mean ‘plates’ of metal. So in verses 11 and 17, lower down.
Here, and wherever it appears, the phrase used in the Hebrew text means rather ‘the tabernacle, which is the meeting-place (between God and man)’.
